<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
    <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8">
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
        <meta name="csrf-token" content="eGRCvHdGTW3lcNMzX7iBzS3ySfTW8lHnqLXpXaD8">
		<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
		<meta name="googlebot" content="noindex, nofollow">


        <title>Laravel</title>

        <!-- Fonts -->
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.bunny.net">
        <link href="https://fonts.bunny.net/css?family=figtree:400,500,600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

        <!-- Scripts -->
        <script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/@vite/client"></script><link rel="stylesheet" href="http://[::1]:5173/resources/css/app.css" /><script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/resources/js/app.js"></script><script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/resources/js/profile/religion-caste-selector.js"></script><script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/resources/js/profile/location-typeahead.js"></script><script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/resources/js/profile/about-me-narrative.js"></script><script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/resources/js/matrimony/occupation-engine-entry.js"></script>    </head>
    <body class="font-sans antialiased">
        <script>
(function () {
    function stack() {
        var s = document.getElementById('app-toast-stack');
        if (!s) {
            s = document.createElement('div');
            s.id = 'app-toast-stack';
            s.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:1rem;right:1rem;z-index:99999;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5rem;max-width:min(22rem,calc(100vw - 2rem));pointer-events:none';
            document.body.appendChild(s);
        }
        return s;
    }
    function pushToast(message, tone) {
        var text = String(message || '').trim();
        if (!text) {
            return;
        }
        var el = document.createElement('div');
        el.setAttribute('role', 'status');

<html lang="en">

        <title>Laravel</title>

        <!-- Fonts -->
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.bunny.net">
        <link href="https://fonts.bunny.net/css?family=figtree:400,500,600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

        <!-- Scripts -->
        <script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/@vite/client"></script><link rel="stylesheet" href="http://[::1]:5173/resources/css/app.css" /><script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/resources/js/app.js"></script><script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/resources/js/profile/religion-caste-selector.js"></script><script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/resources/js/profile/location-typeahead.js"></script><script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/resources/js/profile/about-me-narrative.js"></script><script type="module" src="http://[::1]:5173/resources/js/matrimony/occupation-engine-entry.js"></script>    </head>
    <body class="font-sans antialiased">
        <script>
(function () {
    function stack() {
        var s = document.getElementById('app-toast-stack');
        if (!s) {
            s = document.createElement('div');
            s.id = 'app-toast-stack';
            s.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:1rem;right:1rem;z-index:99999;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5rem;max-width:min(22rem,calc(100vw - 2rem));pointer-events:none';
            document.body.appendChild(s);
        }
        return s;
    }
    function pushToast(message, tone) {
        var text = String(message || '').trim();
        if (!text) {
            return;
        }
        var el = document.createElement('div');
        el.setAttribute('role', 'status');
